name: Kentucky-West Virginia Louis Stokes Alliance for Minority Participation
summary: KY-WV LSAMP is a consortium of colleges and universities working together to create, enhance, and expand programs designed to broaden participation and increase the quality and quantity of students from underrepresented populations who receive degrees in

name: Zeta Beta Tau
summary: Zeta Beta Tau Fraternity

name: The Graduate School
summary: The mission of the Graduate School is to promote excellence at all levels of graduate education at the University of Kentucky.

name: HR Student Employment
summary: HR Student Employment is a service designed to help current UK students find flexible, student-friendly job opportunities off-campus and through on-campus third-party vendors.

name: Forestry and Natural Resources Graduate Student Association
summary: The Forestry and Natural Resources Graduate Student Association is an organization dedicated to the needs, goals, and interests of the FNR Department graduate students. We provides opportunities and services for our students, faculty, and community.

name: American String Teachers Association (ASTA) Student Chapter
summary: An organization for students interested in string-instrument education and performance.

name: Office of Undergraduate Research
summary: The Office of Undergraduate Research (OUR) is dedicated to providing coordination, leadership, and support for University of Kentucky undergraduates interested in pursuing mentored research and creative work across all majors and class levels.

name: Asian Women’s Alliance
summary: Asian Women’s Alliance is here to foster a community and sense of belonging among Asian and Asian American women on campus. Of course it is not limited to just Asian women, anyone is welcome to join!

name: Women in Pre-PA Club
summary: Women in Pre-PA Club: Preparing and guiding undergraduate women who intend to attend a Physician Assistant program.

name: Marginalized Genders in Gaming
summary:
Welcome to the Marginalized Genders in Gaming club at the University of Kentucky!

To learn more about our events join us on Discord!

 https://discord.gg/4cZPXYs96c!

name: Statistics Graduate Student Association
summary: The goal is to encourage an active social environment among statistics graduate students while supporting their academic and professional journey. We provide opportunities for professional development as well as comradery building events.

name: Disability Resource Center
summary: The University of Kentucky Disability Resource Center partners with qualified students with disabilities to assist them in gaining equal access to institutional programs and services consistent with their unique needs.

name: Phi Alpha Honor Society
summary: The purpose of Phi Alpha Honor Society is to provide a closer bond among students of social work and promote humanitarian goals and ideas.

name: Community Scholar Program
summary: The Community Scholar Program (CSP) at the University of Kentucky is a cohort-based internship program built around the dual pillars of community service and leadership development.

name: College of Design
summary: UK College of Design

name: Student Parent Organization
summary: The Student Parent Organization brings together student parents, i.e. currently enrolled students who are also raising children at UK. The SPO consolidates advocacy efforts and plans events that create a supportive, nurturing environment for everyone.

name: First Generation Professionals
summary: First Generation Professionals is an organization at the J. David Rosenberg College of Law that provides resources and mentoring for first generation law students.

name: Queer POC Association
summary: This organization is designed provide community, support, representation and advocacy for students that are BIPOC and are a member of the LGBTQ community, this organization is for all queer BIPOC minorities on the UKY campus.

name: Immigration Law Society
summary: The Immigration Law Society is an organization within the UK Rosenberg College of Law that aims to educate and inform law students as well as the larger legal community about the issues within the American immigration system.

name: Innovation Club
summary:
To improve the social and professional acumen of its members through real-life application of STEM, and the social sciences.

Promote the welfare of these professions.

name: Nigerian Graduate Students Association
summary: The Nigerian Graduate Students Association is an association created “to holistically represent, unite, and cater to the needs of enrolled Nigerian graduate students at the University of Kentucky.”

name: American Chemical Society-Graduate Student Organization
summary: A graduate student organization that will be affiliated with the American Chemical Society. The organization will provide a community for graduate students interested in chemistry, career and professional development, diversity, networking, and outreach

name: Dermatology Interest Group - Northern Kentucky
summary: The Dermatology Interest Group - Northern Kentucky is an organization that provides UKCOM-NKY students the opportunity to explore the field of dermatology through monthly meetings, community outreach programs, networking opportunities, and much more!

name: HealthCare Cats
summary: The mission of HealthCare Cats is to "Provide an avenue into college and healthcare opportunities for rural students of Kentucky in order to create a better Commonwealth." We present to rural high schools in Kentucky on healthcare careers and college.

name: Center for the Enhancement of Learning and Teaching
summary: BBNvolved page for the Center for the Enhancement of Learning and Teaching.

name: Northern Kentucky Anesthesia Interest Group
summary: for students who have an interest in anesthesia, whether that be an interest in the specialty or an interest in the practice (those who may take care of critical care patients who have undergone anesthesia, are interested in pain management, etc.) in NKY.

name: Environmental Law Society
summary: The Environmental Law Society is an organization directed towards University of Kentucky Rosenberg College of Law students that have an interest in energy and natural resource law.

name: Kappa Alpha Pi
summary: Learn about the vast array of careers in the legal field and gain valuable insights into the law school application process. Helps with LSAT prep, applications, and connections to further career opportunities!

name: Information Technology Services
summary: Information Technology Services (ITS) provides IT resources utilized by University of Kentucky (UK) students, faculty, staff, visitors, members of the University community, citizens of the Commonwealth, and beyond.

name: Asian and Pacific American Law Student Association
summary: Our mission is to provide a national voice for APA law students, foster professional and personal development, and advocate for the dignity of our communities. We work closely with legal and affinity organizations across communities to advance advocacy.

name: The Community Development Society
summary: The Community Development Society is an organization that aims to strengthen and advance community development policy, practice, learning, and research through educational means.

name: Poli Sci Pals
summary: Poli Sci Pals is a peer-led mentor and tutoring based organization to help students enrolled in tough Political Science courses better understand the material being presented to them and provide mentoring services to "Poli Sci" majors and minors!

name: Doctoral of Social Work Student Community
summary: The Doctor of Social Work Student Community (DSWSC) at the University of Kentucky brings together students enrolled in the Doctor of Social Work program. It provides a platform for students to connect beyond the online classroom, fostering relationships.

name: Collaborative Art Group Engagement
summary: Art Education Student Chapter – Coll.a.g.e (Collaborative art group engagement)provides leadership, volunteer opportunities, professional career development and educational opportunities for art education students at the University of Kentucky.

name: It's On Us
summary: It’s On Us at UK is part of a nation-wide movement to end sexual assault and interpersonal violence through student-centered engagement. Our goal is to create a safe and inclusive space to train and support the University of Kentucky community.

name: Substance Use Disorder Support, Education, and Destigmatization
summary: We are an interprofessional student organization with the goal of combatting substance use disorder (SUD) through support of those affected, educating individuals about SUD and harm reduction, and reducing stigma surrounding SUD.

name: Bachelor's to Law Undergraduate Education (BLUE) Law Society
summary: The BLUE Law Society is a student organization established to serve students enrolled in the Bachelor's to Law Undergraduate Education (BLUE) Program at the University of Kentucky.

name: Movement Mentors
summary: We are a volunteer organization that aims to close the gap in physical activity participation between girls and boys, while encouraging all youth to be active. Volunteers promote physical activity at local schools acting as active role models for them!

name: The Lucky Ones: Impact on Foster Youth
summary: Our non-profit organization strives to raise awareness about the issues of the foster care system and provide tangible support and resources for foster youth throughout the state.

name: Caribbean Student Association
summary:
The Caribbean Student Association aims to enhance understanding and offer a gateway to experience the Caribbean, encompassing its culture, economy, and history, both within the university and the Lexington
community.

name: Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering Graduate Student Association
summary: MAE-GSA is an student association for all graduate students at the Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering department at University of Kentucky.

name: Transfer Year Experience
summary: Transfer Year Experience is for Transfers

name: UK Center for the Environment
summary: The UK Center for the Environment serves as a hub for all research-related organizations and centers centers across the university and provides mentorship support for students, staff and faculty who are pursing environmental research.

name: SCRAP Student Sculpture Club
summary: A club for any UK students interested in sculpture, 3D design, and material processes.

name: CATS For Ghana
summary: Offering free tutoring services for a rural village in Ghana. Through fundraising money(to pay for Internet and computers), books, and school supplies, we provide these donations to keep our tutoring services running.

name: To Be Discussed
summary: A diverse creative community

name: Wildcat Pulling Team
summary: The Wildcat Pulling Team at the University of Kentucky is an engineering design team that designs and builds a 1/4 scale pulling tractor to compete with at the annual ASABE International 1/4 Scale Tractor Competition.

name: Public Policy Society
summary: We're a student-ran group nurturing future policy leaders. We offer resources like civic-minded programs and guest speakers to empower and inspire our members.

name: The Jesus Generation
summary: A discipleship ministry gathering communities around Jesus, Love, and Family.

name: Disney Professional Development Club
summary: An organization aimed at educating students on how to further their professional development to fulfill their goals based on the Walt Disney Company.

name: Themed Entertainment Association
summary: TEA at UK is to be largely focused on the role of the engineer in the themed entertainment industry and to connect students to opportunities to immerse themselves within the industry.

name: Stanley and Karen Pigman College of Engineering
summary: The official BBNvolved page for the Stanley and Karen Pigman College of Engineering.

name: CPC College
summary: We are a home away from home... a family away from family.“Our mission is to take every student we meet one step closer to becoming a true disciple of Jesus Christ.”

name: M-G CAFE Office of Access, Community and Engagement
summary: BBNvolved page for M-G CAFE  Office of Access, Community and Engagement

name: Collective of Fine Artists and Scientists
summary: CFAS is a club dedicated to merging science and art in an educational and recreational setting!

name: Criminal Justice Association
summary: The Criminal Justice Association (CJA) connects students and professionals, offering resources like workshops and networking to promote ethical practices, collaboration, and advancement in criminal justice.

name: Pre-Athletic Training Student Organization
summary: This organization is intended for students wishing to pursue a career in athletic training in the future. The organization will attempt to prepare students to apply to graduate programs and to decide what kind of career path they wish to pursue.

name: Lewis Ventures Club
summary: Lewis Ventures Club (LVC) is a student-led organization at UK that helps students launch and grow ventures through mentorship, workshops, and resources, connecting founders with partners and funding to turn ideas into real businesses.

name: Northern Kentucky Military Interest Group
summary: The Northern Kentucky Military Interest Group's purpose is to spread awareness and inform students of military medicine and how they can become part of it through the Health Professions Scholarship Program and, above all, support military students.

name: Latin Social Work Scholars
summary: To establish a space for unity for Latin scholars to connect academically through the social work practices.

name: Distillation, Wine, and Brewing Club
summary: The DWBS club at the University of Kentucky is a dynamic organization dedicated to fostering a vibrant community for students enrolled in the DWBS certificate. Our club serves as a hub for collaboration, education, and growth in the beverage industry.

name: Cadet Association for Team Success
summary: About Booster club for the University of Kentucky Army Reserve Officer Training Corps cadet program. (Not affiliated with the United States Army or Army ROTC.)

name: Student Advocates for Rural Healthcare and Dentistry
summary: SARHD is a student-led organization that aims to empower students that wish to have a voice and meaningful impact within rural healthcare and dentistry. Our main goal is to make a difference in rural communities, no matter how big or small it is.

name: Rho Epsilon Iota
summary: Rho Epsilon Iota is the nation’s first premier real estate fraternity, powered by FIRE (Future Investors in Real Estate). We are dedicated to fostering the next generation of real estate professionals by creating an inclusive environment for learning.

name: University of Kentucky Jiu-Jitsu Club
summary: This is a training group for Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, wrestling, judo, and all forms of grappling. Anyone from complete beginners to experienced competitors is welcome; Our main focus is technique, strategy, and live-rolling

name: Women Business Leaders
summary: This program pairs Gatton undergraduates with prominent female business leaders to foster personal and professional growth. Students attend monthly sessions, have bi-weekly mentor meetings, and develop relationships with other mentees throughout the year

name: Onelove Foundation
summary: One Love is a nonprofit organization dedicated to educating youth about healthy and unhealthy relationships. One Love started in 2010 after Yeardly Love, a student at the University of Virginia, was tragically killed by her ex-boyfriend.

name: Aviation Club
summary: A welcoming club where any student can learn more about aviation at the University of Kentucky. Main club activities includes plane spotting at the Bluegrass Airport and watching live plane spotting videos. Students learn about all things aviation!

name: Urban Forest Initiative
summary: BBNvolved page for the Urban Forest Initiative.

name: Egyptian Student Association
summary: The Egyptian Student Association is dedicated to celebrating and promoting Egyptian culture, heritage, and unity within the campus community. Our mission is to foster a welcoming community through cultural events, education, and social engagement.

name: Path to Practice
summary: An undergraduate research club, made with the intention to build future investigators. Through peer led instruction and events, we create a low pressure environment to collecting research experience to help students excel in their future endeavors.

name: Refuge
summary: Refuge aims to help refugee students overcome resettlement hardships such as education accessibility, health literacy, and social navigation through mentorship between college students at UK and refugee students in Lexington.

name: Transfer Student Association
summary: The Transfer Student Association strives to foster an inclusive environment for all transfer students at the University of Kentucky by offering academic, professional, and social opportunities on campus.

name: ForensiCats
summary: ForensiCats is a community of students interested in forensic science. Opportunities for networking and career exploration will be provided through guest lectures from forensics experts and social events.

name: Psychology Access, Community & Engagement Club
summary: The PACE Club is composed of undergraduate and graduate students majoring in Psychology or Neuroscience, and we are focused on promoting engagement within the Psychology Department, including experiential learning, research, extracurriculars, and service

name: Aperture Journal of Undergraduate Research
summary:
Aperture is an open-access, interdisciplinary, peer and expert reviewed student journal at the
University of Kentucky. Aperture is edited and produced by an undergraduate student editorial
board of peer editors.

name: Recovery, Education, Advocacy, Community, Hope
summary: R.E.A.C.H. UK is an organization that provides drug addiction education through promoting harm reduction methods, research, and offering volunteer outreach opportunities.

name: Building H.E.R. (Honorable.Educated.Respectable) Young Women
summary: Building H.E.R. empowers young women to be honorable, educated, and respectable through mentorship, community support, and leadership opportunities. Join us in inspiring the next generation to thrive and succeed!

name: Pre-Optometry Club at the University of Kentucky
summary: This is the official Pre-Optometry club at the University of Kentucky. The purpose of this organization is to bring together students with a common interest in optometry.

name: Interprofessional Healthcare Residential Community Alumni
summary: Alumni page for former students of IHRC

name: Network of Enlightened Women
summary: The Network of Enlightened Women educates, equips, and empowers women to be principled leaders for a free society.

name: GenetiCATS
summary: The GenetiCATS is a student-led organization dedicated to exploring the fascinating world of genetics, genomics, and molecular biology, as well as the careers and pre-professional opportunities associated with them.

name: National Organization for the Professional Advancement of Black Chemists and Chemical Engineers, University of Kentucky, Student Chapter
summary: The NOBCChE University of Kentucky Student Chapter intends to organize activities that promote academic excellence, professional development, and community engagement in chemistry, chemical engineering, and related fields.

name: Society of Automotive Engineers - Paducah
summary: Society of Automotive Engineers - Paducah builds a Baja racing buggy and takes part in the Baja SAE Competition.

name: Undergraduate Mathematics Club
summary: Math Club connects students through academic talks, panels, and social events. Open to all majors and years—anyone with an interest in math is welcome to join the University of Kentucky undergraduate math club.

name: RaiseHER
summary: RaiseHER is a student-led organization at the University of Kentucky that empowers women, mothers, and families through advocacy, education, and community service—raising awareness, support, and one another to create lasting change.

name: Foreign Language and International Economics Club
summary: FLIE is an interdisciplinary club for anyone interested in language learning and business. Our goal is to create a community for students interested in both learning a new language and achieving a successful career after graduation.

name: NAMI On Campus
summary: NAMIOC's objective will be to promote mental health awareness, education, and volunteerism. The club will hold mental health-centered events, with the opportunity for collaboration between UK's undergraduate and professional students, and NAMI reps.

name: Gift of Life Bone Marrow Club
summary: Gift of Life Bone Marrow Club is a national organization across college campuses that raises awareness for bone marrow donation and hosts registry drives to connect students to be matched to save a life

name: Pharm cats
summary: Club for BSPS students to network socialize, and explore different career options and pathways

name: Child Life Club
summary: The Child Life Club is a student-led organization focused on enriching the understanding of the Child Life Specialist profession.

name: Nu Rho Psi – The National Honor Society in Neuroscience
summary: Nu Rho Psi is the National Honor Society in Neuroscience, founded in 2006 by the Faculty for Undergraduate Neuroscience and now an independent honor society. We are a non-profit, grass-roots organization comprised of neuroscientists.

name: Robotics and Advanced Surgical Technology Club
summary: Provide early exposure to surgery through robotic surgery platforms, augmented reality (AR), simulation-based training, and emerging operative technologies.

name: Hispanic Finance Network
summary: A Student organization that supports Hispanic/Latinx students and early-career professionals pursuing careers in finance. We focus on mentorship, professional development, and access to finance opportunities through programming and university resources.

name: Student Account Services
summary: BBNvolved page for Student Account Services.
